overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a cyberpunk-style diner interior with neon lighting, vinyl booth seating, and a pool table area. The scene features NPC patrons, industrial decor with exposed ductwork, and vibrant purple and orange neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner aisle with red booth seating and purple neon wall lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the diner aisle past occupied booths on the left

notable_agents.action: patron sitting in booth eating and drinking

entered.detail: classic diner booth seating with red upholstery lining the left wall
horizontal purple neon lighting running along the wall above the booths
long fluorescent light tubes suspended from the industrial ceiling
light-colored wooden table with condiments and drinks in the booth area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk diner aisle with red vinyl booths on the left illuminated by purple neon strips. The camera moves forward past a patron eating in the nearest booth, with fluorescent ceiling lights visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pool table area with orange neon backlighting

events.description: moving from the dining booth area into the open pool table section at the back

agents.ego_description: approaching the pool table where other patrons are gathered and playing

notable_agents.action: group of patrons standing around the pool table engaged in a game

entered.detail: green-felt pool table with balls arranged for play and overhead lighting
warm orange neon strips illuminating the back wall behind the pool area
rotating ceiling fan with lights hanging above the pool table
television screen mounted high on the wall showing a sports broadcast

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open pool table area at the back of the diner, dominated by orange neon backlighting. The camera approaches a pool table where patrons are standing and playing, with a ceiling fan and wall-mounted TV visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner wall with promotional posters and booth seating

events.description: turning around to walk back along the opposite wall with promotional posters

agents.ego_description: walking back along the poster-lined wall past booths on the right side

notable_agents.action: patron in cowboy hat sitting at table with drinks and food

entered.detail: wall covered with framed promotional posters advertising food specials
red upholstered booth seating now visible on the right side of the aisle

segments.scene_description: The camera turns and walks back along the opposite wall, revealing promotional posters on the left and red booths on the right. A patron wearing a cowboy hat sits at a nearby table with drinks, while the pool table area recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cyberpunk diner that shifts from a narrow, neon-lit aisle into an open gaming area before circling back through the seating. It begins by gliding past red vinyl booths illuminated by purple neon strips, moving forward past a dining patron toward the fluorescent glow of the ceiling. As the space opens up, the camera enters a pool table area dominated by vibrant orange backlighting, approaching a group of patrons playing under a ceiling fan and wall-mounted TV. The scene then shifts as the camera turns to walk back along the opposite wall, passing promotional posters while the pool area recedes into the background. Finally, the movement concludes by passing a patron in a cowboy hat seated at a table with drinks, returning to the row of red booths.
